New version available. Install

Memento

idle
Legacy install detected. A pip-installed collector is registered as a system service. Run memento-collector uninstall before using this app to avoid double-syncing.
Sidecar binary not bundled. The frozen collector hasn't been built for this platform yet. From a terminal, run cd tauri-collector/sidecar && python build_sidecar.py and restart this app.

Paste the Memento URL you use in the browser. If your install uses separate ports (e.g. http://host:3001 for the web UI), the app will auto-route the collector to the API port (8001).

Get this from Settings → Users → Reset collector token on the web UI.

Configure the server URL on the Server tab, then come back here to see the dashboard.

Disable any tool you don't want the collector to watch. Changes take effect after the daemon is restarted. 


    


    
    

      
Memento

      

        Cross-device memory for your AI coding tools — collects, indexes
        and surfaces conversations + memory files from Claude Code,
        Codex, Cursor, Obsidian, Antigravity, Hermes and OpenClaw.
      

      

        
Desktop version
